name: reconciler
summary: The nothing-fails-silently backstop. Sweeps the data layer for any signal with no terminal run (limbo) and raises an incident. Out-of-process guarantee: routing may be best-effort, the reconciler must be reliable. Idempotent — never double-raises.

admission.note: Candidate. NOT in harness/manifest.json and NOT admitted. Promotion is a human step.

exit: Every limbo signal is raised as an incident, or there are none.
invariants: A signal with no terminal run is raised as an open incident — silence is impossible.
Idempotent: a signal already covered by a run or already raised is not re-raised.
Reliable/out-of-process by design: it is the guarantee, not best-effort.
